characters.name: Aren Valis
characters.description: Archivista del Nexo que manipula Orbets con más entusiasmo que sentido común.
characters.visual_traits: male scholar, dark indigo archive robes with silver trim, messy dark hair, tired eyes, slim build, always slightly sweating, Orbet fragments on a leather belt, soft blue reflection on glasses
characters.comedy_factor: Konosuba-style straight man who snaps; overexplains under pressure; roasted by every NPC; physical comedy when handling relics

characters.name: Korr
characters.description: Guardia veterano del Archivo Abisal; desconfía de los eruditos teóricos.
characters.visual_traits: broad-shouldered guard, scarred jaw, short gray buzz cut, heavy pauldrons, torch in hand, exaggerated angry eyebrows
characters.comedy_factor: loud skeptic; yells in ALL CAPS energy; blames the scholar first; sweatdrops and vein pops

locations.name: Abyssal Domain
locations.aesthetic: Inverted floating ruins, bioluminescent teal mist, broken bridges between monoliths, rain that falls upward, ancient holographic UI fragments

locations.name: Neo-Aethel
locations.aesthetic: Brutalist crystal spires over a drowned city, neon sigils on wet concrete, mag-lev trams through fog, corporate-cult banners
